reviews.comment:

Also took the time to check our shower heads ans taps to ensure water is flowing well throughout the house with no blocks.
Our plumber ran through future options for us when we asked and what’s best suited for our h

Thank you again for choosing Houseworks Plumbing. We’re always here if you need anything in the future 😊

reviews.comment: Needed two small jobs sorted before my kitchen renovation started . Pin hole in a water pipe and outdoor shower taps . Was quoted $660 . Was obviously a little dumbfounded and said no thanks .The onsite plumber did them both in his lunch break . Took him literally 20 minutes and happily took $50 . Enough said .
reviews.reply:
Thanks for the feedback Ivan. Just to clarify for anyone reading — the quote provided was for proper repair of a damaged water main (cutting out and replacing the affected section) along with supply and replacement of the outdoor shower taps. That includes using the right materials and carrying out a repair we can properly stand behind.

We provide free upfront pricing so customers can decide before anything goes ahead. What you’ve described afterwards wasn’t work carried out by us, so we can’t

reviews.comment:
We asked Tim to renovate our bathroom, laundry and toilet. The standard of the work was of the highest quality and he completed in less time then expected. We are extremely happy with the final job
Thanks Tim!

We hope you enjoy your new space for years to come. Thanks again for choosing us!

reviews.comment: See my profile Business Owner contact this Whatsapp  Number..

Shipping took over a month to arrive.
They promised three-day delivery on site.
Tracking numbers never updated the entire time.
When it got here, it was wrong.
I received a completely different colored item.
Returning it costs more than the product.
Do not trust their shipping estimates ever.
​

The quality of this item is terrible.
It broke within two days of use.
The materials feel cheap and very plastic.
I paid a premium price for junk.
Customer service refused to offer a refund.
They blamed me for the structural failure.
Absolute garbage from a dishonest company.

The product arrived completely broken today.
The packaging was flimsy and very thin.
I tried to call their support line.
No one answered after an hour waiting.
This was a total waste of money.

​I am beyond disappointed with this place.
The staff was incredibly rude to us.
We waited over an hour for nothing.
The quality of the product was poor.
I asked for a refund immediately.
They refused to help or apologize.
Never coming back to this location.
Save your money and go elsewhere.
Super professional service and successfully installed a brand new hot water system for me, and also organised the electrician to connect it. A+++

I paid for job and did not complain but wouldn't use again.
reviews.reply:

You had mentioned that you had already had a go yourself and could feel

reviews.comment: Happy with the service we received from Tim and his team. The new basin tap set we had them install didn’t stop the dripping tap issue that led to us calling on them. The taps were 40+yrs old and needed replacing anyway. However, when we asked for it to be checked, Tim turned up promptly. As it happens, it turned out that the issue was not a plumbing one but an issue with water quality. Grit was being captured under the tap washer. It appears to have since resolved itself. Tim clearly stands beh
reviews.reply: Thank you for the detailed review, Paul. We're really glad to hear Tim and the team could help out and get to the bottom of the issue. Happy to hear it’s sorted now. We appreciate the recommendation and are always here if you need anything.

Tim came recommended from our surveyor and we have used him 3 times now. Can highly recommend

We really appreciated the prompt help that you provided to us - thank you.

Tim was fantastic. He came around to our house to assess a job for us, a quote was provided by email the same day and we were contacted to book in our job promptly. The job was completed professionally, on time and to our satisfaction. I will not use any other plumber than Tim and his awesome team.
On time and very happy with plumbing job and excellent clean up

As always, Tim turned up when he said he would, surveyed what the issue was and provided potential solutions and the probable costs of those solutions so that I understood the best and worse possible outcomes. Couldn't ask for any more than that.

Tim did a fantastic job as usual. He was quick to respond when our ancient hot water system packed up. We had a brand new one installed the next day and when that was faulty he contacted the supplier who was prompt to come and fix it. Very happy with the service.
Great service. Very helpful, accomodating, punctual and professional. Happy to recommend.
Fantastic quality of service and affordable pricing! Also I like the way of interactive communications and arrival estimation. Great job guys!

Tim and his team provide excellent customer service, are consistently friendly, prompt and efficient I have used Houseworks several times now. I appreciate receiving a no obligation transparent quote for the work that needs to be undertaken upfront rather than it being based just on how much time the job takes.I highly reccomend Houseworks.

reviews.comment:
Charging $528 for the first hour is exorbitant. We didn't get a quote until they turned up to do the job. It was as emergency before the weekend and we needed the work done.
Will not use again , overpriced.
The reply to this review is all the communication we have had.
And sending out the invoice is just giving a link which doesn't open to the invoice.
Will never use this service again.
reviews.reply: Hi, Wilma. We’re sorry to hear that you’re not happy with our pricing. To clarify, we don't charge $528 an hour, that was our fee for unblocking drains. There was no obligation to accept the quote right away, especially since the quote was free. You were happy with the price at the time, agreed to it, and signed the quote before we started any work. If you had any concerns about the price, you could have raised them before we began the work, and we would have been happy to discuss them with you.

reviews.comment: Tanks for your awesome service, I had a substantial water leak which other plumbers were unable to locate. Tim took the time to carefully locate and then quickly fix. Great job Houseworks!
Thanks for your knowledge and experience, Tim!
Urgent work he has done. Looks honest very good work on reasonable price. Good luck
Professional and organised. They planned everything to perfection. Thanks again
